title: Episode I Adventures 5: The Ghostling Children
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|The Ghostling Children}} {{Redlink}} {{Book |image=[[File:Adventures5.jpg]] |title=''Episode I Adventures 5:
The Ghostling Children'' |author=[[Dave Wolverton]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |early release= |release date=[[January]] [[2000]]''Episode I Adventures 5: The Ghostling Children'' |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages=128 |isbn=9780439101424 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=c. [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]]''Episode I Adventures 5: The Ghostling Children'' tells a continuous story with the next three ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Adventures]]'' books, and {{FactFile|12|ANA 1-4|Anakin Skywalker}} states that Anakin Skywalker was between the ages of 5 and 9 during the events of the books, giving a range of [[37 BBY/Legends|37]]–[[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. ''The Ghostling Children'' also depicts Anakin as older than the eight-year-old Arawynne, putting the books in 33 BBY. |series=''[[Star Wars: Episode I Adventures]]'' |preceded by=''[[Episode I Adventures 4: Jedi Emergency]]'' |followed by=''[[Episode I Adventures 6: The Hunt for Anakin Skywalker]]'' }} '''''Episode I Adventures 5: The Ghostling Children''''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] junior novel written by [[Dave Wolverton]]. It is the fifth volume of the ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Adventures]]'' series, and it was published by [[Scholastic]] in [[January]] [[2000]], with an accompanying gamebook. A sequel, [[Episode I Adventures 6: The Hunt for Anakin Skywalker|''The Hunt for Anakin Skywalker'']], was published the [[February|following month]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''The Ghostling children live on a beautiful, isolated world, safe from harm…until they are captured by an evil trader. Soon they find themselves on the harsh planet of Tatooine, about to be sold to the terrifying Gardulla the Hutt.'' ''Their only hope of survival is a young slave named Anakin and his friends.''
